questions.question: Explain the four layers of the TCP/IP protocol stack and their main functions.
expectedPoints: Application Layer: Provides network services to user applications
Transport Layer: Ensures end-to-end communication and reliability
Internet Layer: Handles packet routing and addressing
Network Interface Layer: Manages physical network connections

questions.question: Compare and contrast Software-Defined Networking (SDN) with traditional network architecture, discussing at least three advantages of SDN.
expectedPoints: Separation of control and data planes
Easier implementation of network policies and security
